general_feedback: The single change (line 74) replaces a TODO with a clear, accurate description of the `C` type parameter. It correctly characterizes `C` as the self-type used as the return type for operations preserving the concrete map type (consistent with `removed`, `removedAll`, and similar signatures returning `C`). Style is consistent with the neighboring `@tparam K`, `V`, and `CC` entries: lowercase start, no trailing period, uses backticks where appropriate. No other @param/@tparam/@return tags were modified in this diff.
